title: Decision Wheel
summary: Offline-ready spinner for quick calls: Yes, No, Up to you, or Wait & try again.

title: Countdown Timer
summary: Up to 4 simultaneous countdown timers with custom titles. Set a duration or pick a target date & time (max 99 hrs).

title: Coin Flip
summary: Animated heads or tails coin flip with optional best-of-N series mode. Works offline.

title: Quick Notes
summary: Minimal scratchpad that saves to your browser. Supports multiple notes with localStorage persistence.

title: Base64 Codec
summary: Encode and decode text or files (including images) to and from Base64. All processing stays in your browser.

title: Color Picker
summary: Pick colors, generate harmonious palettes, and copy values in HEX, RGB, and HSL. Works offline.

title: AI Chat
summary: Chat with Qwen3.5-0.8B running locally in your browser via WebGPU. Supports vision. No data leaves your device.

title: Motivational Quote
summary: AI-generated original motivational quotes. Runs locally in your browser.

title: Infinite Radio
summary: AI-generated epic cinematic music streaming infinitely. Learns your taste locally. No data leaves your device.

title: Invoice Generator
summary: Build clean, single-page invoices in your browser. Auto-saves, prints to A4, exports/imports JSON. No data leaves your device.
